---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-24"
---
Load libraries.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(writexl)
library(ggrepel)
```

Read in JCEC data.

```{r}
a3ss_jcec <- read.csv('rmats_output/A3SS.MATS.JCEC.txt', sep = '\t')
a5ss_jcec <- read.csv('rmats_output/A5SS.MATS.JCEC.txt', sep = '\t')
mxe_jcec <- read.csv('rmats_output/MXE.MATS.JCEC.txt', sep = '\t')
ri_jcec <- read.csv('rmats_output/RI.MATS.JCEC.txt', sep = '\t')
se_jcec <- read.csv('rmats_output/SE.MATS.JCEC.txt', sep = '\t')
```

Define function for processing each of these tables - i.e., identifying which events are significant.

```{r}
df_processing <- function(df, splice_event_type) {
  # Calculate average RNAseq read count in each group
  # Helper function - compute IJC + SJC per sample, then average across samples
  get_avg_rc <- function(ijc_col, sjc_col) {
    mapply(function(ijc, sjc) {
      ijc_vals <- as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(ijc, ",")))
      sjc_vals <- as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(sjc, ",")))
      sample_sums <- ijc_vals + sjc_vals
      mean(sample_sums)
    }, ijc_col, sjc_col)
  }
  
  # Apply the helper function
  df$avg_RC_1 <- get_avg_rc(df$IJC_SAMPLE_1, df$SJC_SAMPLE_1)
  df$avg_RC_2 <- get_avg_rc(df$IJC_SAMPLE_2, df$SJC_SAMPLE_2)
  
  # Compute average PSI for each row for each group
  df$mean_psi_vals_1 <- sapply(df$IncLevel1, function(x) {
    mean(as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(x, ","))), na.rm=TRUE)
  })
  
  df$mean_psi_vals_2 <- sapply(df$IncLevel2, function(x) {
    mean(as.numeric(unlist(strsplit(x, ","))), na.rm=TRUE)
  })
  
  # Now identify significant events in a separate DF called filtered_df
  # At least 5 counts on average per group
  filtered_df <- dplyr::filter(df, avg_RC_1 >= 5, avg_RC_2 >= 5)
  
  # Filter out if mean_psi_vals_1 < 0.05 and mean_psi_vals_2 < 0.05 
  # Filter out if mean_psi_vals_1 > 0.95 and mean_psi_vals_2 > 0.95
  filtered_df <- dplyr::filter(filtered_df, !( (mean_psi_vals_1 > 0.95 & mean_psi_vals_2 > 0.95) | (mean_psi_vals_1 < 0.05 & mean_psi_vals_2 < 0.05) ))
  
  # Filter out based on FDR threshold
  filtered_df <- dplyr::filter(filtered_df, FDR <= 0.01)
  
  # Filter on IncLevelDifference - should be redundant with our rmats command given we specified cstat 0.1
  filtered_df <- dplyr::filter(filtered_df, abs(IncLevelDifference) >= 0.10)
  
  # Add a "sig" column to our original DF based on filtered_df
  df$sig <- ifelse(df$ID %in% filtered_df$ID,
                   ifelse(df$IncLevelDifference > 0,
                   'Up in Saline',
                   'Up in TMAO'), 'n.s.')
  
  # Specify the splicing event type in case we want to combine processed dataframes later
  df$splicing_event_type <- splice_event_type
  
  return(df)
}
```

Apply the function.

```{r}
a5ss_jcec_processed <- df_processing(a5ss_jcec, "A5SS")
a3ss_jcec_processed <- df_processing(a3ss_jcec, "A3SS")
mxe_jcec_processed <- df_processing(mxe_jcec, "MXE")
ri_jcec_processed <- df_processing(ri_jcec, "RI")
se_jcec_processed <- df_processing(se_jcec, "SE")

# Output all results
write_xlsx(
  list(
    A5SS = a5ss_jcec_processed,
    A3SS = a3ss_jcec_processed,
    MXE = mxe_jcec_processed,
    RI = ri_jcec_processed,
    SE = se_jcec_processed
  ),
  path = 'diff_splicing_analysis_results.xlsx'
)

# Output just the significant events

a5ss_jcec_processed_sig <- dplyr::filter(a5ss_jcec_processed, sig != "n.s.")
a3ss_jcec_processed_sig <- dplyr::filter(a3ss_jcec_processed, sig != "n.s.")
mxe_jcec_processed_sig <- dplyr::filter(mxe_jcec_processed, sig != "n.s.")
ri_jcec_processed_sig <- dplyr::filter(ri_jcec_processed, sig != "n.s.")
se_jcec_processed_sig <- dplyr::filter(se_jcec_processed, sig != "n.s.")

write_xlsx(
  list(
    A5SS = a5ss_jcec_processed_sig,
    A3SS = a3ss_jcec_processed_sig,
    MXE = mxe_jcec_processed_sig,
    RI = ri_jcec_processed_sig,
    SE = se_jcec_processed_sig
  ),
  path = 'sig_diff_splicing_events.xlsx'
)
```

Make volcano plot.

```{r}
# Combine all the events into one DF for plotting
a5ss_for_plotting <- dplyr::select(a5ss_jcec_processed, ID, geneSymbol, splicing_event_type, IncLevelDifference, FDR, sig)
a3ss_for_plotting <- dplyr::select(a3ss_jcec_processed, ID, geneSymbol, splicing_event_type, IncLevelDifference, FDR, sig)
mxe_for_plotting <- dplyr::select(mxe_jcec_processed, ID, geneSymbol, splicing_event_type, IncLevelDifference, FDR, sig)
se_for_plotting <- dplyr::select(se_jcec_processed, ID, geneSymbol, splicing_event_type, IncLevelDifference, FDR, sig)
ri_for_plotting <- dplyr::select(ri_jcec_processed, ID, geneSymbol, splicing_event_type, IncLevelDifference, FDR, sig)

for_plotting <- rbind(a5ss_for_plotting,
                      a3ss_for_plotting,
                      mxe_for_plotting,
                      se_for_plotting,
                      ri_for_plotting)

# Add a -log10(FDR column)
# First replace 0 FDR with a # with defined log
for_plotting$FDR <- pmax(1E-15, for_plotting$FDR)
for_plotting$neglog10fdr <- -log10(for_plotting$FDR)

# Make volcano plot
# Label points certain points
for_plotting <- for_plotting %>%
  dplyr::mutate(label = ifelse(ID %in% c(32311, 14275, 84336, 15051, 2592, 3427, 8897, 107347), paste(geneSymbol, splicing_event_type, sep = "_"),
                        NA))

# To make the plot small enough to manage in Illustrator, eliminate points with FDR = 1
for_plotting_filtered <- dplyr::filter(for_plotting, FDR < 1)

ggplot(for_plotting_filtered, aes(x = IncLevelDifference, y = neglog10fdr, color = sig)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Up in Saline" = "#9f329f",
      "Up in TMAO"   = "#008888",
      "n.s."         = "lightgray"
    ),
    breaks = c("Up in Saline", "Up in TMAO")
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = label),
    na.rm = TRUE,
    size = 3,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray70") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray70") +
  labs(
    x = "Delta PSI (Inclusion Level Difference: Saline-TMAO)",
    y = "-log10(FDR) - capped at 15",
    title = "Volcano Plot for Differential Splicing Analysis"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.81, 0.72),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.background = element_rect(
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.3
    ),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "black")
  )

ggsave("volcano_plot_splicing.pdf", width = 4, height = 3)
```
